segments.text: I cried out to God with my voice— To God with my voice;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: And He gave ear to me.
In the day of my trouble I sought the Lord; My hand was stretched out in the night without ceasing; My soul refused to be comforted.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I remembered God, and was troubled; I complained, and my spirit was overwhelmed.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You hold my eyelids open; I am so troubled that I cannot speak.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I have considered the days of old, The years of ancient times.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I call to remembrance my song in the night; I meditate within my heart, And my spirit makes diligent search.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Will the Lord cast off forever? And will He be favorable no more?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Has His mercy ceased forever? Has His promise failed forevermore?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Has God forgotten to be gracious? Has He in anger shut up His tender mercies?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: This is my anguish; But I will remember the years of the right hand of the Most High.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will remember the works of the Lord; Surely I will remember Your wonders of old.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will also meditate on all Your work, And talk of Your deeds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Your way, O God, is in the sanctuary; Who is so great a God as our God?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You are the God who does wonders; You have declared Your strength among the peoples.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You have with Your arm redeemed Your people, The sons of Jacob and Joseph.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The waters saw You, O God; The waters saw You, they were afraid; The depths also trembled.
The clouds poured out water; The skies sent out a sound; Your arrows also flashed about.
The voice of Your thunder was in the whirlwind; The lightnings lit up the world; The earth trembled and shook.
Your way was in the sea, Your path in the great waters, And Your footsteps were not known.
You led Your people like a flock By the hand of Moses and Aaron.
